title: Fast Port Scanner in Python
description: Multithreaded Python port scanner with banner grabbing, built as a lightweight alternative to nmap for CTF environments.

title: Bash Recon Automation
description: Bash script to automate initial recon: nmap, gobuster, whatweb and screenshot capture in one command.

title: Python Reverse Shell Generator
description: Lightweight Python script to generate reverse shell one-liners for multiple languages during CTF and pentesting.
